name: triplan
description: Multi-agent travel planner built on Google's A2A Protocol — orchestrator dispatches to independent AI agents via JSON-RPC 2.0

scripts.kill-ports: for port in 3000 3001 3002 3003 5173; do pid=$(lsof -ti tcp:$port 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pid" ] && kill -9 $pid && echo "killed :$port"; done
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "orchestrator,attractions,accommodation,transportation,web" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,cyan,magenta" "npm run dev" "npm run dev:attractions" "npm run dev:accommodation" "npm run dev:transportation" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:agents: concurrently --names "orchestrator,attractions,accommodation,transportation" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,cyan" "npm run dev" "npm run dev:attractions" "npm run dev:accommodation" "npm run dev:transportation"
scripts.build:web: cd web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:web
